tracks.title: UX Research & User Journey Mapping
tracks.description: Conduct user interviews, create empathy maps, and design wireframe user flows.

milestones.description: Structure user navigation and synthesize qualitative research insights.

resources.title: UX Design & User Research Fundamentals
resources.notes: Define user personas, map pain points, and construct wireframe sitemaps.

tracks.title: Visual Layout, Typography & Color Systems
tracks.description: Master visual hierarchy, grid systems, typography pairing, and accessible color palettes.

milestones.title: Visual Aesthetics & Interface Rules
milestones.description: Craft clean, accessible UI screens following modern design principles.

resources.title: Refactoring UI & Interface Design Book
resources.notes: Master spacing, visual hierarchy, font scaling, and contrast ratios.

tracks.title: Figma Interactive Design Systems
tracks.description: Construct reusable Figma components, auto-layout variants, and interactive prototypes.

milestones.title: Component Architecture & Prototyping
milestones.description: Build production-ready design tokens and clickable prototypes.

resources.title: Figma Advanced Masterclass Tutorial
resources.notes: Create responsive auto-layout containers, component properties, and design tokens.

resources.title: Complete Mobile App Prototype Project
resources.notes: Build a multi-screen interactive mobile app prototype with animated micro-interactions.
